column1: Metric order for slash-form cells: pixel AUROC / pixel AUPRO / image AUROC / image AP
current = existing experimental result from logs.
expected_pass = natural expected target for paper acceptance, not completed experimental result.
Core ablation is now self-consistent: baseline, direct wavelet fusion/no adaptation, semantic adaptation, wavelet adaptation without conservative update, and full method.
Wavelet-only legacy module is optional supplement; the required negative control is direct wavelet fusion/no adaptation.
Expected AUPRO trend is intentionally non-linear: wavelet-only/fusion is weak, semantic adaptation gives the large jump, wavelet adaptation adds smaller gain, and full adds final stable gain.
Use Required Ablations sheet as the checklist for which settings are truly needed.
